* ci(renovate): modernize config and bump reusable workflow

* ci(renovate): add missing secrets
chore(config): update marcusrbrown/renovate-config preset to v4 (#25)

-   Add config plugin to enable correct behavior on android.([#​34160](https://redirect.github.com/expo/expo/pull/34160) by [@​alanjhughes](https://redirect.github.com/alanjhughes))

##### 🐛 Bug fixes

-   \[iOS] Fix an issue where the app will crash when using the popover presentation style on iPad. ([#​33996](https://redirect.github.com/expo/expo/pull/33996) by [@​jblarriviere](https://redirect.github.com/jblarriviere))
-   \[Android] Fix an issue where the browser would close when returning from the background.([#​34160](https://redirect.github.com/expo/expo/pull/34160) by [@​alanjhughes](https://redirect.github.com/alanjhughes))

##### 💡 Others

-   \[Android] Started using expo modules gradle plugin. ([#​34176](https://redirect.github.com/expo/expo/pull/34176) by [@​lukmccall](https://redirect.github.com/lukmccall))
-   \[apple] Migrate remaining `expo-module.config.json` to unified platform syntax. ([#​34445](https://redirect.github.com/expo/expo/pull/34445) by [@​reichhartd](https://redirect.github.com/reichhartd))
